summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Kontengrafi landing page completed. All 37 test assertions passed across structural, behavioral, copy, palette and responsive checks at 1920/1024/375 viewports.
tests_executed: No 'AI' / 'kecerdasan buatan' / 'artificial intelligence' anywhere in page text
Services: 4 cards present; UGC Content uses dark accent (bg-slate-900)
Hero primary CTA -> wa.me?text=... with target=_blank
Navbar initial bg-transparent; after window.scrollY>16 has backdrop-blur + bg-white/80
Nav links 'Layanan' and 'Kontak' smooth-scroll to corresponding sections (verified in viewport)
Portfolio Tabs: default = photo (data-state=active); clicking Video activates video tab with 5 items; clicking Photo returns
Contact: WhatsApp wa.me + new tab; IG instagram.com/kontengrafi + new tab; TikTok tiktok.com/@kontengrafi + new tab; Email mailto:halo@kontengrafi.id
No purple/violet/fuchsia/indigo in computed styles — blue (#0047FF) + white + slate only
Mobile (<=1024) hamburger toggles open/close and shows nav links
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: data-testid for service cards uses title.toLowerCase().replaceAll(' ','-') which would collide if two services share a title — currently fine because all 4 are unique, but worth keeping unique key prefixes long-term.
Minor: Portfolio Card data-testid uses replaceAll('—','') (em dash), works but could lead to long ids; consider slug helper.
Minor: <a href='#top'> in Navbar logo expects an element with id 'top' which exists on hero-section (id=top) — verified working.
All interactive elements have proper data-testid coverage; no missing testids found.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React landing page, no backend. All flows validated against https://kontengrafi-landing.preview.emergentagent.com. Re-run /app/test_reports/iteration_1 playwright script for regression on UI changes.
